one_law: Auto Runtime (~10 min) → one Cloud Forge Run POST → up to N doable tasks (default 10). Each row = one recipe unit. No head advance without artifact + verify PASS in Supabase. Throughput = workers × real tasks — never counter theater.

motor.batch_tail_exception: when fewer than cap rows remain, process all remaining — still zero skips on motor fail

definitions.turn: One CF cron or one Cloud Workers Proceed tap
definitions.row: One CLOUD-SEC queue slot — one doable task unit for one cloud worker
definitions.task: Recipe execution bounded by worker timeout — default 1 per row
definitions.shipped: Motor PASS + advance_on_pass + proof gate satisfied
definitions.valuable_ship: Shipped row whose recipe done_when is verified and Supabase holds the proof artifact
definitions.processed: Rows attempted this turn — NOT success by itself
definitions.skipped: FORBIDDEN — motor fail halts turn (INCIDENT-044 no-skip survives)
definitions.counter_theater: Claiming autorun success from head movement or pack.processed alone

forbidden_phrases: seed cycle counts as factory output
mandatory_reply_lines: Quote plan_id + recipe + Supabase artifact — not pack.processed alone.
Say Cloud Forge Run + Auto Runtime — never drain or loop.
Throughput grows by adding cloud workers, not inflating rows_per_turn.

pass_turn_observer_shape.note: PASS requires proof gate per row — processed count is hygiene only
